title: Dark Victory
writer: Casey Robinson, George Emerson Brewer Jr., Bertram Bloch
actors: Bette Davis, George Brent, Humphrey Bogart
plot: A young socialite is diagnosed with an inoperable brain tumor, and must decide whether or not she'll meet her final days with dignity.
awards: Nominated for 3 Oscars. 2 wins & 4 nominations total
